title: #2333 executable focused proof routing

retention.reason: PR #2335 rebuilt #2333 on current master and removed stale predecessor residue while preserving exact proof evidence.

outcome: #2333 focused proof routing is implemented and validated without broad fallback as implicit authority.
evidence_refs: final pushed PR head containing this closeout was rebuilt on current master without #2257 predecessor files, #2334 friction lifecycle surfaces, or task-summary downgrade
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py summary --target . --format json: passed
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json: selected_module_health=healthy action_required=false
uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py tests/test_workspace_makefile_targets.py -q: 137 passed
uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py -k "focused_domain_route or missing_focused_route or tiny_profile_returns_next_validation_action" -q: 3 passed
uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py -k changed_selector -q: 31 passed

uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_proof.py tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py .agentic-workspace/config.toml Makefile tests/test_workspace_makefile_targets.py --select domain_proof_route_inventory_audit,proof_route_strategy_decision,route_refinement_required --format json: audit current; strategy focused; route_refinement not-required
uv run --active python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py upgrade --target . --repair-managed-local-instructions --format json: updated .agentic-workspace/AGENTS.md
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py report --target . --section runtime_mirror_consistency --format json: shape_in_sync

closure.provenance: PR #2335 blocker repair on rebuilt master-based branch
closure.reopen_trigger: Reopen if proof routing again selects broad workspace proof without typed escalation, route audit misses stale/non-executable/overlapping focused route defects, or Makefile suite targets stop being serial by default.

proof_report.implementation proof: Full proof CLI suite, Makefile route fixtures, focused route selectors, workspace CLI suite, maintainer surfaces, contract tooling, structured inventory, generated command packages, lint, typecheck, runtime mirror, summary, managed-instructions repair, and scoped planning doctor passed on the rebuilt head.
proof_report.serial default proof: Makefile fixture coverage proves root and package test targets pass PYTEST_PARALLEL_ARGS through but default to an empty serial value on Windows and non-Windows paths.
proof_report.route authority proof: The repository route inventory is current; typed escalation conditions, route roles, precedence, and allowed composition are declared in config/schema/parser and consumed by the proof router.
proof_report.stack hygiene proof: Effective diff excludes #2257 skill-dependency files and #2334 proof-friction lifecycle files while preserving current master Planning state instead of selecting #2333 or stale predecessors.

closure_check.reopen trigger: None unless new evidence shows #2333 proof routing or serial-default acceptance is incomplete.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Focused proof routing now uses typed escalation conditions, route roles, precedence/allowed-composition authority, executable route audits, complete representative regressions, and serial-by-default Makefile suites with explicit parallel opt-in.

execution_run.next step: push rebuilt PR #2335 and verify exact-head CI/semver
